subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Soul is the human will to live temporally. Spirit is the Divine Will to live forever. Salvation is the quickening of soul into Spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @reincarnation, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @free will and predestination; fate, @the human soul, @differences in human capacity
